step.title: Load quick-spec
step.action: Read docs/planning-artifacts/quick-spec.md and extract goal, scope, and acceptance criteria.

step.title: Plan approach
step.action: Identify which files to create or modify. Outline the implementation plan in 3-5 bullet points.
Flag any risks or unknowns before starting.

step.title: Write tests
step.action: Write tests that cover the acceptance criteria from the quick-spec.
Run tests to confirm they fail (red phase).

step.title: Implement
step.action: Write the minimal code to make all tests pass.
Follow existing code style and patterns in the project.

step.title: Commit
step.action: Run the full test suite to confirm nothing is broken.
Commit with a clear message referencing the quick-spec.
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md with a summary of changes.
